title: ARCANE AGRICULTURE
description: A Mixture of Farming and Magic.. with a hint of tech!
body:
**Arcane Agriculture** is a cozy magic-and-farming modpack for **Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric)**, designed to deliver a relaxing yet engaging gameplay experience. Grow powerful crops, master mystical arts, and enjoy a soft touch of tech — all supported by a wide selection of **Quality-of-Life enhancements** that make every moment smooth and enjoyable.

Whether you're tending enchanted fields, brewing arcane mixtures, or gently automating your homestead, this modpack provides a warm and comfortable atmosphere perfect for casual or long-term play.

### 🌟 Features

* 🧙 **Magic Systems** — Immerse yourself in spellcasting, enchantments, and arcane progression.
* 🌱 **Expanded Farming** — Cultivate numerous crops, both natural and magical.
* ⚙️ **Light Tech Elements** — Small automation options that support farming without breaking the cozy charm.
* 🛠️ **QoL Enhancements** — Inventory tweaks, visual improvements, smoother gameplay.
* 🎨 **Beautiful Visuals & Shaders** — For a more immersive and magical world.
* 🏡 **Comfy Vibes** — Slow-paced, immersive, and perfect for relaxed gameplay sessions.

### 🔗 Included Mod / Resource Links / Credits

**Shaders used in this modpack:**

* [Complementary Reimagined shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
* [Rethinking Voxels shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
* [Insanity Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader)
* [BSL Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
